name: kardosh-realty
description: Kardosh Realty — Landing (public site) and Dashboard (admin)

scripts.build: npm install --prefix Landing && npm install --prefix Dashboard && npm run build --prefix Landing && npm run build:hostinger --prefix Dashboard && node scripts/compose-dist.mjs
scripts.build:landing: npm install --prefix Landing && npm run build --prefix Landing && node scripts/copy-landing-dist.mjs
scripts.build:dashboard: npm install --prefix Dashboard && npm run build --prefix Dashboard && node scripts/copy-dashboard-dist.mjs
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix Landing && npm install --prefix Dashboard
